reply: Then let the cards rest; some evenings only ask to be heard. I am here, and I am not going anywhere — awful days grow a little lighter once they are spoken aloud. Tell me what weighed on you, in your own time.
suggestions: Can I just tell you what happened today?
How do I let go of a heavy day before I sleep?
Why does everything feel like too much right now?
What would help me feel a little lighter tonight?
